academic.passage: The study of smog encompasses the investigation of air pollution caused by various pollutants, including particulate matter and chemical compounds. Smog not only affects visibility but also poses significant health risks. Studies show that prolonged exposure to smog can lead to respiratory issues and aggravate pre-existing conditions. Researchers are continually examining the effects of different smog types, particularly in urban settings, where vehicle emissions and industrial activities are prevalent. Strategies to mitigate smog include government regulations, technological innovations, and public awareness campaigns aimed at reducing emissions.

questions.q: What is the main focus of the passage?
questions.explain: 本段落主要探討有關雾霾的研究，尤其是空氣污染的相關事宜。

questions.q: Which pollutants are mentioned as causes of smog?
questions.explain: 提到的污染物包括微粒物質和化學化合物，它們是造成雾霾的原因。

questions.q: What inference can be drawn about urban settings from the passage?
options: They have more vehicle emissions and industrial activities
They are less affected by smog
They have government regulations in place
questions.explain: 文中提到城市環境中車輛排放和工業活動盛行，因此可以推斷城市中的雾霾更為嚴重。

questions.q: What does the term 'particulate matter' refer to in the context of the passage?
questions.explain: ‘微粒物質’指的是空氣中的微小顆粒，與雾霾的形成有關。

daily.passage: Attention students! The library will be closed for maintenance on Friday, from 8 AM to 5 PM. Please plan your visits accordingly. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

questions.q: When will the library be closed?
questions.explain: 圖書館將在星期五關閉。

questions.q: What is the reason for the library's closure?
questions.explain: 因為圖書館需要進行維護，所以會暫時關閉。
